%% Procedure to obtain and cook "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" (-> Genshin Impact event)"] --> B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\""]
    C -->|"\"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" recipe"| D["Learn the Recipe"]
    D -->|"Learned \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" recipe"| E["Gather Ingredients: Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"]
    E -->|"Ingredients + learned \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" recipe"| F["Cook the Dish \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" at a Cooking Station"]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft flowchart TD A["Step 1: Gather Basic Resources
- Wood
- Crafting table
- Wooden pickaxe"] -->|"wood, crafting table, wooden pickaxe"| B["Step 2: Mine for Stone and Iron
- 17 cobblestone
- At least 3 iron ore"] B -->|"cobblestone (17), iron ore (>=3)"| C["Step 3: Smelt Iron
- Craft furnace
- Smelt iron ore into iron ingots (>=3)"] C -->|"iron ingots (>=3)"| D["Step 4: Collect Water and Lava
- Craft bucket
- Fill bucket with water
- Locate lava source pool"] D -->|"water bucket, lava source pool"| E["Step 5: Create Obsidian
- Pour water on lava source to form obsidian
- Note: diamond pickaxe normally needed to mine obsidian"] E -->|"obsidian (via water + lava)"| F["Step 6: Build Nether Portal without Mining Obsidian
- Build mold with dirt/other blocks
- Place lava with bucket, then water to form obsidian in-frame
- Repeat until portal frame (10 obsidian) is complete"] C -->|"remaining iron ingot(s)"| G["Step 7: Craft Flint and Steel
- Get flint from gravel
- Use flint + iron ingot to craft flint and steel"] F -->|"completed obsidian portal frame"| H["Activate the Nether Portal
- Use flint and steel (-> flint and steel) to light a bottom obsidian block"] H -->|"lit Nether Portal"| I["Enter the Nether
- Stand in portal to be transported"] %% Optional alternate path J["Optional: Obtain Diamond Pickaxe
- Mine diamonds deep underground near lava pools (Y 5–16)
- Craft diamond pickaxe"] -->|"diamond pickaxe"| K["Mine Obsidian Directly
- Mine at least 10 obsidian blocks for portal frame"] K -->|"mined obsidian blocks (>=10)"| F

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations (-> Monster Hunter X, MHX)
flowchart TD
    A["Select Armor Sets with Handicraft points (e.g., Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol)"] -->|"Armor pieces with Handicraft points"| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces to reach Handicraft +10"]
    B -->|"Combined Handicraft from mixed armor pieces"| C["Add Decorations (Gems) with Handicraft at the Smithy"]
    C -->|"Armor + Decorations (Gems) with Handicraft"| D["Equip Charms (Talismans) with Handicraft if available"]
    D -->|"Total Handicraft from armor, decorations, charms (talismans)"| E["Check Skills on Status Screen"]
    E -->|"Handicraft +10"| F["Activate Sharpness +1"]
    F --> G["Progress to Higher-Rank Quests for Better Armor Options"]
    G -->|"New armor materials and options"| C
    G -->|"Materials for armor and decorations (gems)"| H["Hunt Monsters to Gather Materials"]
    H -->|"Materials for crafting at Smithy and forging armor"| C

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, Brewing Stand"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Brewing Stand"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Awkward Potions"| C["Brew Potions of Harming I (Instant Damage I) with Fermented Spider Eye"]
    C -->|"Potions of Harming I (Instant Damage I)"| D["Upgrade to Harming II (Instant Damage II) with Glowstone Dust"]
    D -->|"Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II)"| E["Make Splash Potions of Harming II with Gunpowder"]
    E -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F["Make Lingering Potions of Harming II with Dragon’s Breath"]

%% Procedure to obtain the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh in The Underworld (Hell) to activate Hardmode"] -->|"Pwnhammer (dropped by Wall of Flesh)"| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars in Hardmode"]
    B -->|"3+ broken altars → Titanium Ore can spawn"| C["Mine Titanium Ore in the Cavern layer with a Mythril or Orichalcum Pickaxe or higher"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars at an Adamantite or Titanium Forge"]
    D -->|"35 Titanium Bars"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil"]
    E --> F["Obtain the Titanium Sword"]

%% Centering text across cells in Microsoft Excel without merging (Center Across Selection)
flowchart TD
    A["Open Your Excel Worksheet (-> Microsoft Excel worksheet)"] --> B["Select the Cells (e.g., A1 and B1)"]
    B -->|"selected cells range"| C["Open the Format Cells Dialog"]
    C -->|"Format Cells dialog box"| D["Navigate to the Alignment Tab"]
    D --> E["Select 'Center Across Selection' and desired vertical alignment"]
    E --> F["Apply the Changes"]
    F -->|"text in the first cell of your selection"| G["Verify the Result (text centered across selected cells)"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes (high Looks, good Health)"] -->|"high Looks, good Health"| B["Graduate from High School First (age 18+)"]
    B -->|"age 18+, high Looks maintained"| C["Start as a Foot Model or Junior Model (-> Jobs → Special Careers → Actor/Modeling → Foot Model)"]
    C -->|"entry-level modeling experience"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D -->|"growing Fame, public exposure"| E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog Model / Runway Model)"]
    E -->|"Famous Model status (Fame bar unlocked)"| F["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs (-> Fame menu → hire an agent)"]
    F -->|"agent, elite gigs, high Looks (95%+), Fame"| G["Attend Auditions (luxury brands, runway shows)"]
    G -->|"successful auditions, increased Fame and income"| H["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    H -->|"sustained high Fame, income, high Looks"| I["Max Out Your Fame"]
    I -->|"full Fame, extra income sources"| J["Retire Gracefully (pivot to other fame-based careers if desired)"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI to fix Valorant's Vanguard anti-cheat errors
flowchart TD
    A["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"] -->|"Access to BIOS/UEFI menu"| B["Locate the Secure Boot settings"]
    B --> C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C -->|"UEFI boot mode"| D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D -->|"Secure Boot (Enabled)"| E["Save and exit"]
    E -->|"System with Secure Boot enabled"| F["Verify Secure Boot is on"]

%% Early optimal boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Step 1 – Defeat False Knight
Location: Forgotten Crossroads
Obtain: basic combat practice, access deeper into Forgotten Crossroads"] --> B["Step 2 – Defeat Gruz Mother
Location: Forgotten Crossroads
Use: early-game experience from False Knight, same basic gear"]
    B --> C["Step 3 – Defeat Vengefly King
Location: Greenpath
Use: access to Greenpath from Forgotten Crossroads"]
    C -->|"progress through Greenpath, basic nail, 4–5 masks"| D["Step 4 – Defeat Hornet (Protector)
Location: Greenpath
Obtain: Mothwing Cloak (dash)"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash)"| E["Step 5 – Defeat Massive Moss Charger
Location: Greenpath (side area)
Use: dash for easier dodging and positioning"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash), early-game practice"| F["Step 6 – Defeat Mantis Lords
Location: Fungal Wastes – Mantis Village
Use: dash, 6+ masks, optional charms (Quick Focus, Thorns of Agony)"]

%% Procedure to connect a Nintendo Switch to a PC for gameplay capture/streaming
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Your Equipment: Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC or laptop"] -->|"Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter"| B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B -->|"HDMI cable from dock HDMI OUT"| C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C -->|"HDMI cable to capture card HDMI IN"| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    A -->|"USB capture card, USB cable, PC or laptop"| D
    D -->|"connected capture card (video device)"| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|"capture card selected as video source"| F["Start Playing (view/record/stream Nintendo Switch gameplay on PC)"]

%% Escaping through the main door in "Granny" on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout: house & item spawn locations (-> randomized each game)"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Cogwheels (Red & Blue)"]

    B -->|"Wire Cutters"| C["Disable the Security: use Wire Cutters on door alarm near main door; cut basement wires to disable electrical lock"]
    C -->|"Hammer, Pliers"| D["Remove Barricades: use Hammer on wooden planks at main door; use Pliers to cut basement wires and disable electrical lock"]

    D -->|"Padlock Key"| E["Unlock the Padlock at the main door"]
    E -->|"Master Key"| F["Unlock the Door: use Master Key on main door after all security measures are dealt with"]

    F --> G["Distract Granny (-> Granny): make noises to lure her away while staying stealthy"]
    G --> H["Avoid Traps: bear traps & creaking floors that can alert Granny (-> Granny)"]

    H --> I["Final Steps: with main door unlocked, exit through the door"]

    %% Reminders / general tactics
    J["Remember: on Extreme mode Granny (-> Granny) moves faster; be extra cautious"]
    K["Use hiding spots: under beds and in wardrobes"]
    L["Use sound strategically: dropping items to distract Granny (-> Granny) while staying away"]

    G --- J
    G --- K
    G --- L

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator
flowchart TD
    A["Choose a Gamertag Generator Tool"] -->|"Gamertag Generator Tool"| B["Select Your Preferences"]
    B -->|"Selected Preferences (keywords, style, length, special characters)"| C["Enter Your Information"]
    C -->|"User Information (interests, numbers)"| D["Generate Suggestions"]
    D -->|"Generated Gamertag Suggestions"| E["Review and Pick a Favorite"]
    E -->|"Chosen Gamertag"| F["Check Availability"]
    F -->|"Available or Tweaked Gamertag"| G["Save or Copy Your Gamertag"]

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us"] --> B["Go to the Main Menu"]
    B --> C["Open the Settings"]
    C --> D["Select the 'Data' Tab"]
    D --> E["Find the 'Chat Type' Option"]
    E -->|"Chat Type option"| F["Change Chat Type to 'Free or Quick Chat'"]
    F --> G["Confirm Your Age Setting (account age 13 or older)"]
    G -->|"account with correct age"| H["Save and Exit"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: PlayStation (PS4/PS5) or Xbox (One/Series X/S), one TV/monitor, two controllers"] --> B["Start Fortnite (-> Fortnite)"]
    B --> C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account) and reach Lobby"]
    C -->|"second controller"| D["Connect Player 2’s Controller and Sign In with Different Account"]
    D -->|"Player 2’s controller"| E["Join Player 1’s Lobby"]
    E -->|"two players in Lobby"| F["Select a Game Mode (Duos or Squads)"]
    F --> G["Start the Match (host: Player 1)"]
    G -->|"split-screen session"| H["Play Together in Split-Screen"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Save right before the fight"] --> B["Stock up on healing items"]
    B --> C["Equip high-attack gear and prepare mentally"]
    C --> D["Phase 1: Opening / Early attacks"]
    D -->|"Karma damage awareness, Gaster Blaster timing"| E["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    E -->|"memorized patterns, high HP"| F["Final sequence / Last attack"]
    F -->|"survive long bullet hell, land enough hits"| G["Post-fight sequence and Genocide ending"]

    %% General tips feeding into all phases
    H["Practice in segments"] --> D
    H --> E
    H --> F

    I["Use audio cues (-> Gaster Blasters)"] --> D
    I --> E
    I --> F

    J["Minimal movement / micro-dodging"] --> D
    J --> E
    J --> F

    K["Conserve healing items and use only in safe windows"] --> E
    K --> F

    L["Expect many resets and stay patient"] --> D
    L --> E
    L --> F

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> BitLife) in a country with a President system; high Smarts and Looks"] --> B["Focus on Education: study hard and build popularity & leadership"]
    B --> C["Get University Education: major in Political Science or similar"]
    C --> D["Build a Strong Resume: graduate degree (e.g., Law School) or leadership careers (Lawyer, Business Executive)"]
    D -->|"good jobs, income, leadership experience"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation"]
    E -->|"healthy, reputable character"| F["Enter Politics: run for local office (School Board Director, Mayor) with campaign funds"]
    F -->|"local office position, campaign experience, savings"| G["Climb the Political Ladder: higher offices (Governor, Congress) and positive public image"]
    G -->|"political experience, high approval ratings, strong reputation, funds"| H["Run for President (-> President in BitLife)"]
    H -->|"elected as President"| I["Manage your Presidency: keep approval high, avoid scandals"]
    H -->|"failed presidential run"| J["Repeat if Necessary: keep building reputation and wealth, try next election"]
    J -->|"improved reputation and funds"| H

%% Money-making procedure in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Spring Year 1: Focus on Crops (Parsnips, Potatoes, Strawberries)"] -->|"early-game money from crops"| B["Fishing"]
    B -->|"gold from selling fish"| C["Foraging"]
    C -->|"forage items, Mixed Seeds"| D["Mining"]
    D -->|"ores and bars, gold"| E["Animal Products (Coop, Barn, Chickens, Cows, Goats, Sheep)"]
    E -->|"steady income from animal products"| F["Summer Year 1: Blueberries"]
    F -->|"profit from Blueberries"| G["Fall Year 1: Cranberries"]
    G -->|"high-value crop income"| H["Artisan Goods (Mayonnaise, Cheese, Jelly, Wine)"]
    H -->|"Artisan Goods and profit"| I["Winter: Preparation and Foraging"]
    I -->|"resources and time in Winter"| J["Invest in Upgrades and Infrastructure (house, Sheds, Kegs, Preserves Jars)"]
    J -->|"better production capacity"| K["Quests and Special Events"]

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (game uses BattlEye)"] --> B["Locate the BattlEye Folder in the game directory"]
    B -->|"game directory with BattlEye folder"| C["Find the BattlEye Installer"]
    C -->|"BattlEye installer file (`Install_BattlEye.bat` / `Install_BattlEye.exe`)"| D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D --> E["Follow On-Screen Instructions"]
    E -->|"completed BattlEye installation"| F["Verify the Installation by starting the game"]
    F --> G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F --> H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues"]
    H --> I["Contact Support (game’s support team or BattlEye support)"]

%% Procedure to become an actor in BitLife without God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a High Looks Stat (>80%)"] -->|"High Looks stat"| B["Focus on Your Appearance"]
    B -->|"Maintained/improved Looks"| C["Participate in Activities (e.g., Drama Club)"]
    C --> D["Graduate High School"]
    D --> E["Apply for a Job as a Voiceover Actor"]
    E -->|"Voiceover Actor job"| F["Work Hard and Get Promoted"]
    F -->|"Acting career progression (Actor, Lead Actor, Star)"| H["Strive for Lead Roles and Fame"]
    A -->|"High Looks stat"| G["Maintain Your Looks and Health"]
    F -->|"Ongoing career"| G
    G -->|"Good Looks and Health stats"| H

%% Ways to connect a Wii to a Smart TV
flowchart TD
    A["Start: Decide connection method based on TV inputs and available cables"] --> B["AV (Composite) Connection"]
    A --> C["Component Cable Connection"]
    A --> D["HDMI Connection"]
    A --> E["SCART Connection"]
    A --> F["S-Video Connection"]

    %% AV / Composite
    B --> B1["Identify the AV Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable with yellow video, red/white audio RCA connectors)"]
    B1 -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| B2["Locate AV Inputs on the TV"]
    B2 -->|"Wii composite AV cable and TV AV inputs"| B3["Connect the Cables"]
    B3 -->|"AV connection (yellow/red/white connected)"| B4["Select the AV Input on the TV"]
    B4 -->|"TV on AV input"| B5["Power On the Wii and play"]

    %% Component
    C --> C1["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"]
    C1 -->|"Wii Component Cable (5 connectors)"| C2["Locate Component Inputs on the TV"]
    C2 -->|"Wii Component Cable and TV Component inputs"| C3["Connect the Cables"]
    C3 -->|"Component connection (YPbPr + audio)"| C4["Select the Component Input on the TV"]
    C4 -->|"TV on Component input"| C5["Power On the Wii and adjust Wii component video settings if needed"]

    %% HDMI
    D --> D1["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"]
    D1 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| D2["Connect the Adapter to the Wii"]
    D2 -->|"Wii with HDMI adapter attached"| D3["Connect an HDMI Cable between adapter and TV"]
    D3 -->|"HDMI connection (adapter ↔ TV)"| D4["Select the HDMI Input on the TV"]
    D4 -->|"TV on HDMI input"| D5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% SCART
    E --> E1["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"]
    E1 -->|"Wii SCART Adapter"| E2["Plug the AV Cables (-> Wii composite AV cables) into the Adapter"]
    E2 -->|"SCART adapter with AV cables connected"| E3["Connect the Adapter to the TV SCART input"]
    E3 -->|"SCART connection established"| E4["Select the SCART Input on the TV"]
    E4 -->|"TV on SCART input"| E5["Power On the Wii and play"]

    %% S-Video
    F --> F1["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"]
    F1 -->|"Wii S-Video Cable"| F2["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs and plug in S-Video + red/white audio"]
    F2 -->|"S-Video connection (video + audio)"| F3["Select the S-Video Input on the TV"]
    F3 -->|"TV on S-Video input"| F4["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins of the same denomination"] -->|"two coins"| B["Choose a Partner"]
    B --> C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C -->|"two coins"| D["Hold the Coins"]
    D -->|"two coins and both players"| E["Ask for Permission: “Sara Sarita, may we join your game?” (-> Sara Sarita)"]
    E -->|"two coins"| F["Toss the Coins"]
    F --> G["Interpret the Results: Yes / No / Maybe"]
    G -->|"answer 'Yes'"| H["Proceed with Questions to Sara Sarita"]
    H -->|"questions and two coins"| I["Toss the Coins for Each Question"]
    I -->|"coin results"| G
    H --> J["Conclude the Game: ask “Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?” (-> Sara Sarita)"]
    J -->|"two coins"| K["Toss the Coins to Exit"]
    K -->|"coin results"| L["Interpret Exit Result: need 'Yes' to leave"]
    L -->|"answer 'No' or 'Maybe'"| J
    L -->|"answer 'Yes'"| M["Ending the Game: exit the game"]

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Card Types in Clash Royale"] --> B["Choose Your Win Condition"]
    B -->|"chosen win condition card(s)"| C["Add Support and Defensive Cards"]
    C -->|"support troops and defensive cards"| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|"full set of cards (win condition, support, defense, spells)"| E["Balance Your Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|"balanced deck list"| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|"refined deck"| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|"meta-adapted deck"| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Troubleshooting a flashing blue PlayStation 5 DualSense controller
flowchart TD
    A["Check the Controller's Battery (-> DualSense controller)"] -->|"Charged DualSense controller"| B["Restart the PlayStation 5 Console"]
    B --> C["Reset the Controller (-> DualSense controller)"]
    C -->|"Reset DualSense controller connected via USB-C cable"| D["Check for Firmware Updates on PS5 and Controller"]
    D --> E["Try a Different USB-C Cable"]
    E -->|"Different USB-C cable"| F["Try Connecting to Another Device (another PS5 or PC)"]
    F --> G["Contact Support (-> PlayStation Support)"]

%% Completing the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Unlock the Community Center (-> Community Center)"] -->|"Introduction cutscene with Mayor Lewis (-> Mayor Lewis) and access to the Community Center"| B["Investigate the Community Center"]
    B -->|"Golden Scroll in the Crafts Room (-> Golden Scroll)"| C["Visit the Wizard (-> Wizard's Tower)"]
    C -->|"Ability to read Junimo language and access to bundles (-> Junimos, bundles)"| D["Complete Bundles in All Rooms"]

    %% Crafts Room
    subgraph CR[Crafts Room Bundles]
        D --> CR1["Spring Foraging Bundle"]
        D --> CR2["Summer Foraging Bundle"]
        D --> CR3["Fall Foraging Bundle"]
        D --> CR4["Winter Foraging Bundle"]
        D --> CR5["Construction Bundle"]
        D --> CR6["Exotic Foraging Bundle"]
    end

    %% Pantry
    subgraph P[Pantry Bundles]
        D --> P1["Spring Crops Bundle"]
        D --> P2["Summer Crops Bundle"]
        D --> P3["Fall Crops Bundle"]
        D --> P4["Quality Crops Bundle"]
        D --> P5["Animal Bundle"]
        D --> P6["Artisan Bundle"]
    end

    %% Fish Tank
    subgraph FT[Fish Tank Bundles]
        D --> FT1["River Fish Bundle"]
        D --> FT2["Lake Fish Bundle"]
        D --> FT3["Ocean Fish Bundle"]
        D --> FT4["Night Fishing Bundle"]
        D --> FT5["Crab Pot Bundle"]
        D --> FT6["Specialty Fish Bundle"]
    end

    %% Boiler Room
    subgraph BR[Boiler Room Bundles]
        D --> BR1["Blacksmith's Bundle"]
        D --> BR2["Geologist's Bundle"]
        D --> BR3["Adventurer's Bundle"]
    end

    %% Bulletin Board
    subgraph BB[Bulletin Board Bundles]
        D --> BB1["Chef's Bundle"]
        D --> BB2["Dye Bundle"]
        D --> BB3["Field Research Bundle"]
        D --> BB4["Fodder Bundle"]
        D --> BB5["Enchanter's Bundle"]
    end

    %% Vault
    subgraph V[Vault (Gold Payments)]
        D --> V1["Pay 2,500g"]
        D --> V2["Pay 5,000g"]
        D --> V3["Pay 10,000g"]
        D --> V4["Pay 25,000g"]
    end

    %% Completion
    CR1 --> E["All Crafts Room bundles complete -> Part of Community Center restored"]
    CR2 --> E
    CR3 --> E
    CR4 --> E
    CR5 --> E
    CR6 --> E

    P1 --> E
    P2 --> E
    P3 --> E
    P4 --> E
    P5 --> E
    P6 --> E

    FT1 --> E
    FT2 --> E
    FT3 --> E
    FT4 --> E
    FT5 --> E
    FT6 --> E

    BR1 --> E
    BR2 --> E
    BR3 --> E

    BB1 --> E
    BB2 --> E
    BB3 --> E
    BB4 --> E
    BB5 --> E

    V1 --> E
    V2 --> E
    V3 --> E
    V4 --> E

    E -->|"All bundles complete (-> all rooms restored, Junimos)"| F["Community Center Fully Restored"]
    F -->|"Restored Community Center (-> Community Center), town celebration cutscene in Pelican Town, prevention of JojaMart Warehouse development (-> JojaMart Warehouse)"| G["Enjoy Rewards and Benefits from Bundles"]

%% Basic strategies and tactics for Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck (-> Clash Royale deck)"] -->|"knowledge of cards, elixir costs, strengths, weaknesses"| B["Manage Elixir Efficiently"]
    B -->|"elixir awareness"| C["Build a Balanced Deck"]
    C --> D["Choose Safe Starting Moves"]
    D -->|"initial troops / low-risk cards"| E["Create Pushes and Counter-Pushes"]
    E --> F["Optimize Placement and Timing"]
    F --> G["Apply Defensive Strategies"]
    F --> H["Apply Offensive Strategies"]
    G -->|"surviving defensive troops"| E
    H --> I["Watch Your Opponent’s Moves"]
    I -->|"opponent card cycle & tendencies"| J["Adjust Your Strategy"]
    J --> K["Plan Endgame Strategy (final minute, double elixir)"]
    K --> L["Practice and Learn"]
    L -->|"lessons from replays & top decks"| A

%% How to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams: two teams with a Spymaster and Field Operatives"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: place 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"]
    B -->|"grid of 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"| C["Select a Key Card"]
    C -->|"key card (5x5 grid with red, blue, neutral, assassin)"| D["Determine Starting Team"]
    
    D --> E["Spymaster (-> starting team) Gives Clues"]
    E -->|"one-word clue and number"| F["Field Operatives (-> same team) Guess"]
    F -->|"chosen codenames"| G["Reveal Codenames"]
    
    G --> H["Ending a Turn"]
    H --> I["Switch Turns: other team follows same process"]
    I --> E
    
    G -->|"assassin guessed"| J["End of Game: team that guessed assassin loses"]
    G -->|"all agents of one team identified"| K["End of Game: that team wins"]

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> BitLife)"] --> B["Access the Escape Mini-Game"]
    B --> C["Understand the Grid Layout and Objective"]
    C --> D["Plan Your Moves"]
    D -->|"guard movement rules (guard moves twice; horizontal then vertical)"| E["Avoid Detection"]
    E --> F["Navigate the Maze"]
    F -->|"walls"| G["Strategically Use Walls"]
    G --> H["Calculate Moves"]
    H --> I["Gradually Move to Exit"]
    I --> J["Execute the Escape (reach exit door)"]
    J --> K["Life After Escape"]

    %% Tips (supporting steps)
    subgraph Tips_for_Success
        L["Use Patience"]
        M["Practice to Predict Guard Movement"]
        N["Use Trial and Error (retry different grids)"]
        O["Use the Undo Feature (if available)"]
    end

    D -. "Patience" .-> L
    H -. "Practice predicting guard path" .-> M
    J -. "if caught, retry (Trial and Error)" .-> N
    H -. "correct last move (Undo Feature)" .-> O

%% Procedure to play "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game) and click around"] --> B["Interact with Title Screen letters"]
    
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' in 'NO' by clicking it multiple times"]
    C -->|"fallen 'O'"| D["Use the fallen 'O' to break other letters"]
    
    D --> E["Reveal secret compartment and find the trophy"]
    E -->|"the trophy"| F["Use the trophy to anger the narrator"]
    
    F -->|"the trophy"| G["Use the trophy to break the narrator's block and repair the title"]
    
    G --> H["Enter new scene with the goat and locked cage"]
    H --> I["Get the key from the squirrel by trading a nut"]
    
    I -->|"the trophy"| J["Create a nut by knocking down the tree with the trophy"]
    J -->|"the nut"| K["Open the nut on a stone or hard surface"]
    
    K -->|"cracked nut"| L["Give the nut to the squirrel"]
    L --> M["Receive the key from the squirrel"]
    
    M -->|"the key"| N["Unlock the cage and free the goat"]
    N --> O["Watch the humorous ending sequence"]
    
    O --> P["Read the narrator's final messages"]
    P --> Q["End of Game: complete 'There Is No Game'"]

%% Procedure to find Pale Ore and upgrade the Nail in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Collect Pale Ore #1 (Ancient Basin)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Ancient Basin, from Broken Vessel boss)"| G["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"]
    A1["Reach Ancient Basin (below City of Tears)"] --> A2["Find Broken Vessel boss arena (left side of Ancient Basin)"]
    A2 --> A["Defeat Broken Vessel to receive Pale Ore"]

    B["Collect Pale Ore #2 (Deepnest)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Deepnest, secret chamber)"| G
    B1["Head to Deepnest (from Fungal Wastes or Mantis Village)"] --> B2["Go to bottom-right of Deepnest near Beast's Den"]
    B2 --> B3["Find hidden path to small chamber"] --> B["Pick up Pale Ore"]

    C["Collect Pale Ore #3 (Hallownest’s Crown, Crystal Peak)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Hallownest’s Crown, Crystal Peak)"| G
    C1["Traverse Crystal Peak (requires Crystal Heart ability)"] --> C2["Reach Hallownest’s Crown (top of Crystal Peak)"]
    C2 --> C["Obtain Pale Ore after platforming"]

    D["Collect Pale Ore #4 (Grubfather’s Reward, Forgotten Crossroads)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Grubfather’s Reward, Forgotten Crossroads)"| G
    D1["Rescue 31 grubs scattered in Hallownest"] --> D2["Visit Grubfather (northwest Forgotten Crossroads)"]
    D2 --> D["Receive Pale Ore from Grubfather as reward"]

    E["Collect Pale Ore #5 (Kingdom’s Edge, Nailmaster Oro)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Kingdom’s Edge, from Nailmaster Oro boss)"| G
    E1["Reach Kingdom’s Edge (from City of Tears or Tram)"] --> E2["Go to Colosseum of Fools, then left to Nailmaster Oro’s hut"]
    E2 --> E["Defeat Nailmaster Oro to receive Pale Ore"]

    F["Collect Pale Ore #6 (Seer’s Reward, Resting Grounds)"] -->|"Pale Ore (Seer’s Reward, Resting Grounds)"| G
    F1["Collect 300 Essence with Dream Nail"] --> F2["Visit the Seer (Resting Grounds)"]
    F2 --> F["Receive Pale Ore from the Seer"]

    G["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"] -->|"Pale Ore (all collected) + Geo"| H["Stronger Nail (upgraded attack power)"]

%% How to obtain Demon Keys and Colored Keys in Geometry Dash
flowchart TD
    %% Demon Keys
    A["Play & Complete Online Levels to Collect Orbs"] -->|"orbs (need 500 orbs for 1 Demon Key)"| B["Reach 500 Orbs to Receive a Demon Key"]
    B -->|"Demon Keys"| C["Use Demon Keys in the Treasure Room to Open Demon Chests"]

    %% Colored Keys - Blue Key
    D["Collect 50 Diamonds"] -->|"50 diamonds"| E["Unlock the Vault of Secrets via Settings Lock Icon"]
    E --> F["Enter Code 'The Challenge' in the Vault of Secrets"]
    F -->|"special challenge level in Vault of Secrets"| G["Complete the Challenge to Obtain the Blue Key"]

    %% Colored Keys - Green Key
    E --> H["Access the Basement via Door in the Vault of Secrets"]
    H --> I["Enter Code 'The Challenge' in the Basement"]
    I -->|"special challenge in the Basement"| J["Complete the Challenge to Obtain the Green Key"]

    %% Colored Keys - Orange Key
    E --> K["Prerequisite Met: Vault of Secrets Unlocked (for Chamber of Time)"]
    L["Collect 500 Diamonds"] -->|"500 diamonds"| M["Unlock the Chamber of Time via Lock on Level Select Screen"]
    K --> M
    M --> N["Enter Code 'River' in the Chamber of Time"]
    N --> O["Receive the Orange Key"]

    %% Additional Tips
    P["Do Daily & Weekly Quests to Earn Extra Orbs and Diamonds"] -->|"extra orbs & diamonds"| A
    P -->|"extra diamonds"| D
    P -->|"extra diamonds"| L
    C --> Q["Regularly Visit the Treasure Room to Open Chests and Claim Rewards Using Demon Keys"]

%% Ways to obtain hardwood in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD

    %% 1. Chopping Large Stumps
    A["Upgrade Axe to Copper Axe at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Copper Axe"| B["Locate Large Stumps on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    B -->|"Copper Axe"| C["Chop Large Stumps (2 hardwood per stump)"]

    %% 1. Chopping Large Logs
    D["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Steel Axe"| E["Locate Large Logs on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    E -->|"Steel Axe"| F["Chop Large Logs (8 hardwood per log)"]

    %% 2. Secret Woods
    D -->|"Steel Axe"| G["Remove blocking log and Access the Secret Woods"]
    G --> H["Visit the Secret Woods (-> daily)"]
    H -->|"Large Stumps in Secret Woods"| I["Chop all Large Stumps (12 hardwood per day)"]

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees – getting seeds
    J["Chop Mahogany Trees, Large Stumps, Large Logs, or defeat slimes (-> Secret Woods)"] -->|"Mahogany Seeds"| K["Gather Mahogany Seeds"]
    K --> L["Plant Mahogany Seeds on your farm"]
    L --> M["(Optional) Use Tree Fertilizer on Mahogany Seeds"]
    M --> N["Wait for Mahogany Trees to grow"]
    N -->|"Mahogany Trees"| O["Chop Mahogany Trees with any axe for hardwood"]

    %% 4. Purchasing from Robin
    P["Visit Robin's Carpenter's Shop"] --> Q["Purchase hardwood (if available)"]

    %% 5. Crates and Barrels in Mines or Skull Cavern
    R["Explore the Mines or Skull Cavern"] --> S["Break Crates and Barrels for a chance at hardwood"]

    %% 6. Fishing Treasure Chests
    T["Fish at any location with a Fishing Rod"] --> U["Open Treasure Chests for a chance at hardwood"]
